problem id: 89bcfe7c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01110111 -> 10000001
  01101000 -> 00000001
  00000011 -> 10000000
  01111000 -> 00000001
  01000110 -> 00000001
  00100111 -> 10000000
  01111011 -> 10000001
  10001101 -> 10000010
  11101100 -> 00000011

query: 00000000
predicted answer: 00000000
